title: Cuneiform Tablet #0266: Ur III Astronomical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a astronomical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a astronomical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Ur III period. Astronomical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records astronomical matters typical of Ur III period administrative or literary practice.
